# UC-12.2.33 · Argo CD Multi-Source Application Partial Source Failure

## Description

One failed source in a multi-source app blocks rendering while others look healthy.

## Value

Isolates which Helm/Kustomize source breaks combined deployments.

## Implementation

Extract `status.sources[].name` and error fields; alert when any source reports fetch errors.

## SPL

```spl
index=devops sourcetype="argocd:application"
| search source_index>=0 OR source_name="*"
| where health_status="Degraded" OR conditions="*Failed*"
| stats values(source_name) as sources, latest(message) as msg by name, namespace
| sort -_time
```

## Visualization

Table (app × failing source), Raw message panel.

## References

- [Argo CD Splunk integration notes](https://github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/wiki/Splunk)
